companies.name: SpaceX
companies.reason: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is weighing a mid‑June initial public offering, aiming to raise as much as $50 billion at a valuation of roughly $1.5 trillion (Reuters).

companies.name: MongoDB Inc.
companies.reason: MongoDB’s shares collapsed 28% in early trading Tuesday following its fourth‑quarter earnings report (CNBC).

companies.name: Ziff Davis, Inc.
companies.reason: Ziff Davis (ZD.O) said on Tuesday it has agreed to sell its Connectivity division … to Accenture for $1.2 billion in cash (Reuters).

companies.name: Thomson Reuters Corp.
companies.reason: Thomson Reuters (TRI) shares rose 3.19% on March 2, 2026, outperforming the broader market … particularly in light of its recently announced leadership transition (Reuters).

companies.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
companies.reason: ServiceNow (NOW.N) forecast annual subscription revenue above Wall Street estimates, signaling strong demand for its artificial intelligence‑powered software products (Reuters).
